content: Backend: 2FA TOTP system (enable/disable/verify, backup codes, integrated in login)
Backend: activity heatmap (7x24 matrix) in public stats
Backend: full whitelist CSV export endpoint
Backend: auto-unblacklist cooldown (cooldown_until field + lazy check + scheduled cleanup)
Frontend: 2FA setup flow in admin (QR code, verify, backup codes, disable)
Frontend: /admin/emails page with filters + table + drill-down
Frontend: cooldown input in blacklist add + column display
